notes: V12 starts with three public Mantle RPC providers. They are public infrastructure, so availability and rate limits can change without notice.
The updater assigns each asset a preferred endpoint and falls back to the other enabled endpoints if a request fails.
V12 uses up to two controlled workers. Multiple healthy providers let those workers make progress without concentrating every request on one endpoint.
A provider is never treated as a source of market evidence: it only serves on-chain data. The snapshot keeps the endpoint history used for reproducibility.
